name: Civics: The Union Legislature
description: The Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha - qualifications, term, sessions, officers, and powers.

name: Civics: The Union Executive
description: The President (election, powers), Vice-President, Prime Minister, and Council of Ministers.

name: Civics: The Supreme Court & High Courts
description: Composition, qualifications, jurisdiction (original, appellate, advisory, writ), and judicial review.

name: History: First War of Independence & Growth of Nationalism
description: Causes and consequences of the 1857 revolt; rise of nationalism and early nationalists.

name: History: The Indian National Movement (1915-1947)
description: Mahatma Gandhi's leadership, Non-Cooperation, Civil Disobedience, Quit India, Forward Bloc, and Partition.

name: History: The World Wars & The UN
description: Causes of WWI & WWII; Rise of Dictatorships (Fascism, Nazism); United Nations structures and objectives.
